chunks.title: Amaziah's Reign and Victory over Edom
chunks.reason: Introduces Amaziah's accession, his partial righteousness, and his military success against Edom.

chunks.title: War between Judah and Israel
chunks.reason: Contains the exchange of messengers, Jehoash's parable, the battle at Beth-shemesh, and Jehoash's return to Samaria.

chunks.title: Death of Amaziah and Accession of Azariah
chunks.reason: Describes the remaining years of Amaziah, his assassination at Lachish, and the coronation of his son.

chunks.title: Reign of Jeroboam II
chunks.reason: Chronicles the reign of Jeroboam II, his restoration of Israel's borders through Jonah, and his death.
